creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ting-Wei Lan from comment #25)

I was trying to convince you to add ufo to psautohint directly when you submitted attachment 205520. I still think it's a better solution but I could fallback to multiple ports with -foo suffix which enables foo option. But it would differ from attachment 205520. I'll see if I could have a patch this weekend.
